fct_orders.sql:
SELECT order_date, SUM(order_total) AS revenue
FROM `dig-demo-sandbox.fiction_retail.fct_orders`
WHERE order_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY order_date

SELECT customer_id, AVG(order_total) AS aov
FROM `dig-demo-sandbox.fiction_retail.fct_orders`
GROUP BY customer_id

revenue_daily.sql:
SELECT order_date, gross_revenue
FROM `dig-demo-sandbox.fiction_retail.revenue_daily`
ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 90
